productRequirements: A task management app where users can create, edit, complete, and delete tasks. Tasks have a title (required, max 200 chars), an optional description, a due date, and a priority level (low / medium / high). Users can filter tasks by status (all / active / completed) and sort by due date or priority. Completing a task marks it done and moves it to the completed list. Deleted tasks are permanently removed.
judgePrompt: You are an expert QA lead evaluating AI-generated test cases. Score based on: completeness of coverage, clarity of steps, inclusion of edge cases and error states, and whether each test case is independently executable. Penalise vague steps, missing expected results, or untestable assertions.

variations.name: Baseline — plain language
variations.testMethodology: You are a senior QA engineer. Generate comprehensive test cases covering happy paths, edge cases, error states, and boundary conditions. Write each test case with a clear title, preconditions, numbered steps, and expected result. Focus on user-facing behaviour.

variations.name: Gherkin format
variations.testMethodology: You are a senior QA engineer. Generate test cases in strict Gherkin format (Feature / Scenario / Given / When / Then / And). Each scenario must be independently runnable. Cover happy paths, edge cases, error states, and boundary conditions. Include a Background section for shared preconditions.
